Reference

Diversity Measures

index_heterogeneity() simulate_heterogeneity() bootstrap_heterogeneity() jackknife_heterogeneity() index_evenness() simulate_evenness() bootstrap_evenness() jackknife_evenness()

index_richness() simulate_richness() bootstrap_richness() jackknife_richness() index_composition() rarefaction()

Richness and Rarefaction

similarity()

Similarity

turnover()

Turnover

Dating

Seriation

seriate_average() seriate_rank() permute() refine_seriation() get_order(<PermutationOrder>)

Visualization

plot_bertin() plot_ford()

Bar Plot

plot(<DiversityIndex>,<missing>)

Diversity Plot

plot_rank()

Line Plot

plot_heatmap()

Heatmap

plot_spot()

Statistics

eppm() pvi()

Independance

Classes

Getters and Setters

get_index() get_method() get_order()

Get or Set Parts of an Object

`[[`(<DiversityIndex>,<ANY>,<missing>) `[[`(<RefineCA>,<ANY>,<missing>) `[[`(<PermutationOrder>,<ANY>,<missing>)

Contents

tabula is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.
